entity.summary: BNB Chain automated-market-maker decentralized exchange with current protocol liquidity and an associated first-party development organization.
entity.notes: Active classification is based on substantial current TVL plus the historical first-party development organization and smart-contract repositories. No canonical website domain was recovered in this review. The shorter label CoinSwap is intentionally not used as an alias because it overlaps an existing HEI entity identity.

evidence.title: CoinSwap Space protocol profile and TVL
evidence.notes: Protocol profile identifies CoinSwap Space as a BNB Chain AMM DEX and reports current TVL.

evidence.title: CoinSwap Space development organization
evidence.notes: Project development organization contains CoinSwap SDK, core swap contracts, and farm contract repositories.
